name: Workhorse Group Inc.
business: Workhorse Group Inc. is a North American manufacturer of medium-duty electric trucks and buses. The company designs and manufactures all-electric vehicles for the commercial transportation sector. Its vehicles are designed for last-mile delivery, medium-duty operations, and specialized applications.

exposures.sentence: Workhorse Group Inc. is a North American manufacturer of medium-duty electric trucks and buses.
We operate a series of FedEx Ground delivery routes in the greater Cincinnati, OH area under an initiative known as Stables by Workhorse.
We resell Geotab telematics to provide real-time vehicle data, maintenance insights, and operational analytics designed to improve fleet efficiency and reduce total cost of ownership.
We offer charging hardware, charging software, project advisory, implementation services, and infrastructure maintenance through various partners.

catalysts.event: Transition production of all vehicles to Workhorse production facility
catalysts.sentence: We expect to transition away from contract manufacturers and shift production of all vehicles into the Workhorse production facility during 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Medium duty trucking market approximately $23 billion
tamClaims.sentence: Primarily focused on meeting the needs of the medium duty trucking market, which we believe to be an approximately $23 billion market.
